hyperedges.name: Impeccable Live Mode Workflow
hyperedges.evidence: All scripts are part of the Impeccable live variant mode workflow, handling browser injection, session management, polling, accept/discard, and completion.

hyperedges.name: Impeccable Design References
hyperedges.evidence: All are reference documents for Impeccable's design-related commands and principles.
